name: Storck-Baugesellschaft mbH
message: Storck-Baugesellschaft mbH is a construction company based out of Germany. STORCK is a nationwide construction company with core competence in the field of commercial and existing buildings. We are enthusiastic about interesting and complex building projects in which a property is revitalized. We have successfully demonstrated our competence in numerous revitalization projects. Currently with the renovation of the KaDeWe in Berlin with the new Void and Atrium. Before that, for example, during the renovation of the WILMA (Wilmersdorf Arcaden), the Paunsdorf Center in Leipzig for the URW, the Dreischeibenhaus in Düsseldorf or the renovation of the Deutsche Bank towers in Frankfurt.
